data.acceptance:
1. When all overview columns are visible, column label text never overflows its column or overlaps adjacent content.
2. The hide control may wrap to a new line when needed to preserve label space.
3. The count component may wrap to a new line when needed to preserve label space.
4. The layout is allowed to use multiple rows for the column header content; it does not need to keep label, hide control, and count on one line.
5. The regression is fixed in the all-columns-visible state.
